primary.name: pure magenta
primary.reason: Frieren's white hair, white robe, gold trim, brown boots, staff, and green eyes stay far away from pure magenta. Pink and purple sprite effects are therefore forbidden in production frames.

fallbacks.name: pure cyan
fallbacks.reason: Use only if magenta or pink effects must be present. Teal eye highlights and blue magic must be avoided.

fallbacks.name: pure green
fallbacks.reason: Use only after visual inspection proves the eye and magic colors are not key-adjacent.

states.name: idle-book
states.purpose: book or calm attention idle variation

states.name: playing-listen
states.purpose: immersive listening, subtle limb motion, no whole-body shake

states.name: playing-soft-step
states.purpose: gentle dance with readable arm, staff, hair, and robe motion

states.name: playing-staff-beat
states.purpose: staff beat loop, grounded feet, stable body anchor

states.name: loading-tune
states.purpose: checking staff signal or tuning radio

states.name: switching-cast
states.purpose: obvious spell cast for track switching

states.name: error-lost-signal
states.purpose: head down or signal lost reaction

sourceRules.effectsPolicy: Keep glow, status rings, particles, and floor marks in CSS when possible. Sprite frames should contain the body, outfit, hair, staff, and only hard-edged attached effects.

legacyBaseline.note: The baseline captures the current live sheet before this production contract existed. Future replacements should pass this contract instead of using concept or transparent-background outputs directly.
